title: Space Portfolio Website
description: A fully responsive personal portfolio website with a stunning space theme featuring canvas-based particle animations, black hole cursor effects, and scroll-driven rocket animations. Managed via Decap CMS — no database needed.
highlights: Built with vanilla JS, CSS animations, and HTML5 Canvas
Black hole cursor particle effect with gravitational pull
Scroll-driven rocket animation with achievement cards
CMS-managed content via Decap CMS + GitHub + Netlify
